comment: Every sensitive intake endpoint must be listed here with its custody CLASS, and gate-sealed-body.mjs enforces a real rejection test per entry. The class is load-bearing: 'sealed' is not one property. Calling a platform-readable body E2E is the kind of overclaim CLAUDE.md treats as a correctness failure, not a wording preference.

classes.SEALED-E2E: The platform holds NO key and exposes no unwrap endpoint. 'We cannot produce plaintext' is literally true. No worker may hold a matching private key or unseal secret — the gate checks for one.
classes.SEALED-TO-PLATFORM: Hop confidentiality and blast-radius hardening only. The body is sealed in transit and at rest in the queue, but a platform-side key can open it by design. Buys real defence against a compromised edge worker or accidental logging. Buys NOTHING against legal compulsion, which is the stated adversary. Never describe this class as end-to-end.

endpoints.note: The incident note is PUBLIC-PLAINTEXT-destined: it is meant to become the public incident record, so the consumer must be able to read it. The evidence ORIGINAL is a separate object and stays SEALED-E2E (reporter + off-platform custodian, no key on the platform, no unwrap endpoint). Honest-limits copy must keep those two apart.
